subcodes.first_line: Your detailed letter was received, and the discussions and conversations which you held with that respected person became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه مفصل شما رسید و مذاکرات و مکالمات که با آن شخص محترم نموده بودید معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @wisdom [hikmat]
